death.attack.brain_hurt.player: %1$s had their brain destroyed while fighting %2$s
death.attack.sandstorm.player: %1$s inhaled too much sand while fighting %2$s
death.attack.pain.player: %1$s had their pain receptors destroyed while fighting %2$s

death.attack.ice.player: %1$s was impaled by ice while fighting %2$s
death.attack.slime.player: %1$s had their body destroyed while fighting %2$s
death.attack.erasure.player: %1$s was erased from existence while fighting %2$s

death.attack.radiation.player: %1$s died from radiation poisoning while fighting %2$s
death.attack.tremor.player: %1$s died during a tremor while fighting %2$s
death.attack.boil.player: %1$s was boiled to death while fighting %2$s

death.attack.world_slash.player: %1$s was sliced to pieces while fighting %2$s
death.attack.slash_strong.player: %1$s was sliced to pieces while fighting %2$s
death.attack.world_slash_strong.player: %1$s was sliced to pieces while fighting %2$s

death.attack.purple: %1$s was disintegrated at a molecular level
death.attack.purple.player: %1$s was disintegrated at a molecular level while fighting %2$s
death.attack.info_overwhelm: %1$s was overwhelmed by an infinite amount of information
death.attack.info_overwhelm.player: %1$s was overwhelmed by an infinite amount of information while fighting %2$s
death.attack.mirror: %1$s looked at their reflection for too long
death.attack.mirror.player: %1$s looked at their reflection for too long while fighting %2$s

death.attack.acidic_posion.player: %1$s was poisoned to death while fighting %2$s
power.eop.dna_change/allay.title: Allay Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/allay.desc: Gentle flying helper spirit known for gathering nearby items and responding playfully to music and movement
power.eop.dna_change/axolotl.title: Axolotl Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/axolotl.desc: Aquatic amphibian skilled in underwater combat, assisting players by attacking hostile mobs and regenerating health quickly
power.eop.dna_change/bat.title: Bat Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/bat.desc: Small nocturnal creature navigating dark caves using rapid fluttering movements and heightened awareness of surroundings
power.eop.dna_change/bee.title: Bee Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/bee.desc: Busy pollinator producing honey and pollinating crops while defending its hive from perceived threats
power.eop.dna_change/blaze.title: Blaze Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/blaze.desc: Fiery floating Nether guardian launching scorching fireballs and thriving within intense heat and lava-filled environments
power.eop.dna_change/camel.title: Camel Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/camel.desc: Tall desert mount capable of carrying two riders, avoiding small obstacles, and traveling long distances efficiently
power.eop.dna_change/cat.title: Cat Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/cat.desc: Agile, independent companion that protects players by scaring off creepers and bringing occasional nighttime gifts
power.eop.dna_change/cave_spider.title: Cave Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/cave_spider.desc: Venomous miniature spider hiding in abandoned mineshafts, striking swiftly with poison-inducing bites
power.eop.dna_change/chicken.title: Chicken Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/chicken.desc: Small passive bird laying eggs frequently, capable of slow falling due to lightweight body and fluttering wings
power.eop.dna_change/cod.title: Cod Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/cod.desc: Common ocean fish swimming in schools, providing simple food and reacting defensively to nearby threats
power.eop.dna_change/cow.title: Cow Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/cow.desc: Gentle grazing animal supplying milk, leather, and beef while roaming peacefully across grassy landscapes
power.eop.dna_change/creeper.title: Creeper Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/creeper.desc: Silent explosive stalker approaching quietly before detonating with powerful destructive force against unaware victims
power.eop.dna_change/dolphin.title: Dolphin Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/dolphin.desc: Playful ocean mammal guiding swimmers, boosting speed, and interacting curiously with floating items and treasures
power.eop.dna_change/donkey.title: Donkey Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/donkey.desc: Reliable pack animal capable of carrying chests and traveling long distances with steady endurance
power.eop.dna_change/ender_dragon.title: Dragon Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/ender_dragon.desc: Massive airborne boss reigning over the End dimension, unleashing destructive attacks and regenerating through end crystals
power.eop.dna_change/elder_guardian.desc: Giant aquatic sentinel inflicting mining fatigue and guarding ocean monuments with powerful laser attacks
power.eop.dna_change/enderman.title: Enderman Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/enderman.desc: Tall teleporting creature moving blocks, avoiding water, and becoming hostile when directly stared at
power.eop.dna_change/endermite.title: Endermite Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/endermite.desc: Tiny hostile pest appearing after ender pearl use, attacking quickly before disappearing naturally over time
power.eop.dna_change/fish.title: Fish Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/fish.desc: Small generic aquatic creature swimming peacefully through rivers and oceans, forming groups and avoiding danger
power.eop.dna_change/fox.title: Fox Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/fox.desc: Sneaky nighttime hunter capable of carrying items in its mouth and swiftly escaping threats
power.eop.dna_change/frog.title: Frog Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/frog.desc: Swamp-dwelling amphibian capable of producing frogspawn and devouring small slimes and magma cubes
power.eop.dna_change/ghast.title: Ghast Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/ghast.desc: Large floating Nether ghost releasing devastating fireballs while crying mournfully across lava oceans
power.eop.dna_change/glow_squid.title: Glow Squid Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/glow_squid.desc: Bioluminescent underwater creature emitting gentle glow, dropping glowing ink sacs for decorative uses
power.eop.dna_change/goat.title: Goat Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/goat.desc: Mountain-dwelling jumper occasionally ramming targets and navigating steep cliffs with ease
power.eop.dna_change/guardian.title: Guardian Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/guardian.desc: Hostile underwater creature defending monuments with piercing laser attacks and protective defensive spikes
power.eop.dna_change/hoglin.title: Hoglin Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/hoglin.desc: Aggressive Nether beast charging enemies and providing valuable food when safely hunted
power.eop.dna_change/horse.title: Horse Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/horse.desc: Fast, loyal mount with varying speed and jump strength, ideal for rapid land transportation
power.eop.dna_change/llama.title: Llama Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/llama.desc: Pack animal forming caravans, carrying goods, and spitting at threats defensively
power.eop.dna_change/magma_cube.title: Magmacube Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/magma_cube.desc: Bouncing fiery cube splitting into smaller versions, thriving within molten Nether environments
power.eop.dna_change/mooshroom.title: Mooshroom Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/mooshroom.desc: Rare mushroom-covered cow providing stew, milk, and unique interactions depending on mushroom type
power.eop.dna_change/mule.title: Mule Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/mule.desc: Hybrid working animal combining donkey utility and horse speed for dependable transportation
power.eop.dna_change/ocelot.title: Ocelot Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/ocelot.desc: Skittish jungle feline avoiding players while hunting small prey and scaring nearby creepers
power.eop.dna_change/panda.title: Panda Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/panda.desc: Bamboo-loving bear exhibiting various personalities affecting behavior, combat, and interactions
power.eop.dna_change/parrot.title: Parrot Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/parrot.desc: Colorful jungle bird able to mimic mob sounds and perch on players' shoulders
power.eop.dna_change/pig.title: Pig Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/pig.desc: Passive farm animal offering pork and serving as a ridable mount with a carrot stick
power.eop.dna_change/piglin.title: Piglin Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/piglin.desc: Gold-loving Nether inhabitant bartering valuable items while attacking players lacking golden equipment
power.eop.dna_change/polar_bear.title: Polar Bear Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/polar_bear.desc: Strong Arctic predator protecting cubs and swimming effectively through icy waters
power.eop.dna_change/pufferfish.title: Pufferfish Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/pufferfish.desc: Defensive ocean fish inflating to poison attackers and ward off threats
power.eop.dna_change/rabbit.title: Rabbit Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/rabbit.desc: Fast, skittish hopper providing food and useful hides while avoiding predators
power.eop.dna_change/ravager.title: Ravager Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/ravager.desc: Massive raid beast destroying crops and charging ferociously at targets during village assaults
power.eop.dna_change/salmon.title: Salmon Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/salmon.desc: Large river fish swimming upstream in groups and serving as reliable food source
power.eop.dna_change/sheep.title: Sheep Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/sheep.desc: Wool-producing grazer available in many colors, essential for crafting beds and decorations
power.eop.dna_change/shulker.title: Shulker Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/shulker.desc: Armored End dweller shooting levitation-inducing projectiles while hiding inside protective shell
power.eop.dna_change/silverfish.title: Silverfish Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/silverfish.desc: Tiny tunnel-dwelling pest swarming players when disturbed from infested stone blocks
power.eop.dna_change/slime.title: Slime Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/slime.desc: Bouncy gelatinous cube splitting into smaller slimes when defeated and roaming swampy areas
power.eop.dna_change/sniffer.title: Sniffer Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/sniffer.desc: Ancient resurrected creature sniffing soil to uncover rare decorative plant seeds
power.eop.dna_change/spider.title: Spider Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/spider.desc: Climbing nighttime predator capable of ambushing players and scaling walls effortlessly
power.eop.dna_change/squid.title: Squid Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/squid.desc: Simple ocean creature releasing ink clouds to escape predators when harmed
power.eop.dna_change/strider.title: Strider Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/strider.desc: Lava-walking creature used as mount within the Nether’s molten oceans, requiring warped fungus control
power.eop.dna_change/turtle.title: Turtle Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/turtle.desc: Beach-dwelling reptile laying eggs and producing scutes for brewing useful potions
power.eop.dna_change/vex.title: Vex Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/vex.desc: Small flying spirit summoned by evokers, phasing through blocks to strike targets quickly
power.eop.dna_change/warden.title: Warden Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/warden.desc: Blind subterranean behemoth detecting vibrations and unleashing devastating sonic attacks when enraged
power.eop.dna_change/wolf.title: Wolf Genetics
power.eop.dna_change/wolf.desc: Loyal tamable canine assisting players in combat and defending them fiercely from threats
power.eop.beyonder.description: Manipulate powerful astral forces, shaping ethereal energy for offense, defense, or transcendental effects beyond physical limitations
power.eop.drifter.description: Shift, merge, or alter dimensional planes, granting movement, perception, and influence across multiple layered realities simultaneously
power.eop.fortress.description: Transform your entire body into living diamond, gaining immense durability, sharpness, and resistance to extreme physical damage
power.eop.speedster.description: Achieve incredible speed, accelerating far beyond conventional limits while maintaining control, precision, and devastating kinetic potential
power.eop.mender.description: Generate new biological structures, restoring damaged tissue or creating entirely new organic forms with controlled regenerative power
power.eop.champion.description: Possess drastically heightened strength, agility, endurance, and reflexes, enabling superhuman feats across any physical activity
power.eop.smith.description: Manipulate and restore metal, repairing structures, reshaping weapons, and reinforcing alloys with controlled precision
power.eop.marine.description: Command water, manipulating flow, pressure, movement, and shape with precision in various environments
power.eop.darwin.description: Instantly evolve physiological traits to survive or overcome threats, developing advantageous abilities in response to danger
power.eop.mimic.description: Alter genetic material in yourself, enabling controlled modification of traits, abilities, or biological functions
power.eop.phobia.description: Influence emotions, instincts, or mental states by controlling neurochemical signals within biological brains
power.eop.experiment.description: Reshape your body by commanding every cell, enabling complex transformations, adaptations, and altered physical structures
power.eop.parasite.description: Control fungal organisms and spores, manipulating growth, spread, and biological interactions with precision and purpose
power.eop.spark.description: Generate, direct, and shape electricity, creating offensive discharges or manipulating electrical systems at will
power.eop.pitch.description: Generate, manipulate, and shape shadows, enabling concealment, movement through darkness, or the creation of tangible shadow constructs
power.eop.flame.description: Create and command fire, shaping flames and heat into offensive or defensive forms with practiced control
power.eop.soul_flame.description: Create and command fire, shaping flames and heat into offensive or defensive forms with practiced control
power.eop.icicle.description: Manipulate cold and ice, lowering temperatures to form frozen structures or disable opponents through chilling energy
power.eop.tempest.description: Influence atmospheric forces, creating storms, winds, lightning, or climate shifts across wide areas
power.eop.warper.description: Reshape fundamental rules of existence, altering physics, matter, or concepts through immense metaphysical influence
power.eop.canine.description: Transform into a powerful wolf-like creature, gaining enhanced senses, strength, and primal instinctual abilities
power.eop.rock.description: Control earth and minerals, reshaping terrain, forming constructs, or weaponizing stone with precision and force
power.eop.thing.description: Convert your body into living stone, gaining immense durability, weight, and resistance against physical harm
power.eop.photon.description: Bend, shape, and generate light, creating     blinding flashes, illusions, or focused        beams of radiant energy
power.eop.contortionist.description: Stretch and reshape your body to extreme lengths, granting flexibility, resilience, and unconventional movement capabilities
power.eop.nullifier.description: Disable or permanently remove supernatural abilities from others through visual contact
power.eop.corrosive.description: Decay matter over time or instantly, breaking down structures, objects, or defenses through corrosive influence
power.eop.node.description: Phase through solid matter by shifting quantum states, avoiding physical interaction or conventional restraints entirely
power.eop.magma.description: Manipulate molten rock and volcanic heat, shaping lava flows or creating intense destructive thermal attacks
power.eop.bloodsucker.description: Gain enhanced strength, speed, and senses, sustained by consuming blood to heal rapidly and maintain peak physical power
power.eop.reactor.description: Release controlled or dangerous radiation, affecting environments, damaging foes and causing massive unwanted destruction
power.eop.marrow.description: Shape, grow, or weaponize      your bones, creating armor, projectiles, or biological constructs          at will
power.eop.flame_marine.description: Manipulate superheated steam and boiling water, forming scalding attacks or defensive vapor constructs
power.eop.magma_experiment.description: Transform your cells into molten-like material, granting intense heat, fluidity, and resilience
power.eop.flame_spark.description: Create and command superheated plasma, forming destructive energy bursts or controlled defensive fields
power.eop.bloodweaver_vitrum.description: Sacrifice your own blood to command a cursed mirror, refracting reality through glass and reflection to unleash distorted, unpredictable attacks
power.eop.oracle.description: Perceive distant or hidden events beyond normal senses, gaining heightened awareness, foresight, and insight into unseen forces
power.eop.honored_one.description: Control space itself, distorting distance, redirecting attacks, and creating impenetrable barriers through precise spatial warping
power.eop.king.description: Generate devastating slicing energy that cuts through any material, delivering precise, unstoppable attacks with lethal efficiency
power.eop.ascendant.description: Harness overwhelming spiritual energy, crushing opponents with sheer pressure and asserting absolute control over weaker beings
power.eop.bloodweaver.description: Control blood internally or externally, shaping it into weapons, restraints, or biological constructs
power.eop.juggernaut.description: Continuously build unstoppable momentum, becoming impossible to halt once movement begins
power.eop.monster.description: Transform into a Nargacuga-like beast with enhanced agility, stealth, and predatory hunting instincts
power.eop.phoenix.description: Become     empowered through fire, resurrecting     from flames stronger and increasingly energized by heat
power.eop.toxin.description: Produce potent toxins through your body, delivering venom through contact, breath, or generated substances
power.eop.veilbinder.description: Summon or embody spirits, allowing ethereal       beings to     interact physically or influence       the environment
power.eop.beast.description: Transform into a lion-based creature, gaining powerful strength, agility, and heightened territorial instincts
power.eop.reptile.description: Become a dinosaur-like being, possessing immense physical power, natural weaponry, and primal ferocity
power.eop.predator.description: Transform into a shark-like predator with heightened senses, aquatic adaptability, and relentless aggression
power.eop.bull.description: Gain the form of a bull-like creature, wielding raw strength, endurance, and unstoppable charging force
power.eop.cannibal.description: Transform into a monstrous wendigo, driven by supernatural hunger and empowered by each consumed victim
power.eop.aberrant.description: Become a chaotic multi-beast   hybrid, combining various animal traits for unpredictable    and versatile abilities
power.eop.conqueror.description: Possess immense strength, durability, and flight through hyper-dense cellular structure, enabling overwhelming power and rapid aerial mobility
power.eop.wyvern.description: Transform into a Gore Magala-like creature with enhanced agility, dark sensory abilities, and Frenzy-infused offensive power
power.eop.wyvern_corrupt.description: Transform into a Chaotic Gore Magala-like beast with unstable strength, volatile Frenzy energy, and heightened aggression
power.eop.wyvern_adult.description: Transform into a Shagaru Magala-like dragon with refined power, radiant energy, and superior aerial and combat abilities
power.eop.threshold.description: Instantly relocate yourself or others across space, bypassing distance by displacing positions through precise spatial transfer
power.eop.deadfall.description: Induce extreme spatial disorientation, disrupting balance, perception, and coordination by overwhelming the senses with vertigo
power.eop.vitrum.description: Control, shape, and generate glass at will, altering its form, density, and sharpness to create structures, weapons, or barriers
eop.extra.water.breathing.title: Water Breathing
eop.extra.frost.walker.title: Frost Walker
eop.extra.climb.title: Climbing
eop.extra.night.vision.title: Night Vision
eop.extra.smelt.title: Smelting
eop.extra.fire.resistance.title: Fire Resistance
eop.extra.entity.sense.title: Entity Sense
eop.extra.super.jump.title: Super Jump
eop.extra.erase.title: Erasure
eop.extra.reach.title: Extra Reach
eop.extra.slow.fall.title: Slow Falling
eop.extra.light.title: Light Source
eop.extra.water.breathing.description: Grant the Water Breathing effect to yourself and nearby allies
eop.extra.frost.walker.description: Create frosted ice blocks when walking over water
eop.extra.night.vision.description: Gain the ability to see clearly in the dark
eop.extra.smelt.description: Smelt any item in your hand
eop.extra.fire.resistance.description: Grant the Fire Resistance effect to yourself and nearby allies
eop.extra.super.jump.description: Gain increased jump power while looking up
eop.extra.erase.description: Erase any item in your hand
eop.extra.slow.fall.description: Grant the Slow Falling effect to yourself and nearby allies
eop.extra.light.description: Create a light source that illuminates the area around you
